## What would you like added?

A clear description of the feature or system you need.

## Why is this useful?

Which game type or use case does this enable? What's currently impossible or very hard without it?

## Proposed API or behavior (optional)

```csharp
// Example of how you'd expect to use it
```

## Alternatives considered

Have you worked around this with existing systems? How?
